listOfQuestions.question: Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: A three-dimensional object or the illusion of one?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: The lightness or darkness of a color?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: The surface quality seen or felt in artwork?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: A pleasing relationship among colors?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: The arrangement of visual elements?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: A method for creating the illusion of depth?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: The area that draws the viewer's attention?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: Difference between visual elements?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: The distribution of visual weight?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: The size relationship between parts?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: A quick drawing that captures movement or pose?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: A drawing that emphasizes outlines and edges?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: Using value to suggest light and form?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: Smoothly transitioning between tones or colors?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: Building an image through multiple applications of media?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: A thin transparent layer of paint or ink?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: The area around and between subjects?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: Artwork made with more than one material or technique?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: A mark that can define shape, direction, and movement?
Which Visual Art Techniques concept is described by this clue: A flat enclosed area?
